sources.title: The Facility (Full Movie) Horror, Thriller
sources.description:
The Facility Full Movie. Eight volunteers find themselves fighting for their lives when a trial goes horribly wrong.

Director: Ian Clark
Writer: Ian Clark (screenplay)
Stars: Aneurin Barnard, Alex Reid, Chris Larkin
2012

Edited for YouTube ad standards
